business.name: Framewrk
business.tagline: The website is already built. All you have to do is say yes.
business.description: Framewrk finds local businesses that show up on Google Maps with no website, uses AI to one-click generate a fully branded, agency-quality website (and optionally a booking/ordering dashboard), and shows the owner a live working preview before they ever pay a cent. Once they say yes, they pay a one-time fee and get full ownership of the code to point their own domain at.

target_segments.name: Local service & retail businesses with no website
target_segments.description: Businesses discoverable on Google Maps / Google Business Profile that list a phone number and address but no website link — restaurants, contractors, salons, med spas, boutiques, studios, and similar local operators.

icp.description: Owner/operator of a small local business that appears on Google Maps but has no website, and who has been putting off getting one due to cost, time, or not knowing where to start.
trigger_events: Business is discoverable on Google Maps but has no website, losing searchers to competitors who do
Owner has been meaning to get a website but hasn't had the time, budget, or technical know-how
disqualifiers: Business already has an active, reasonably modern website
Franchise/corporate location where the local contact has no purchasing authority

pain_points: No online presence despite being findable on Google Maps, losing customers who bounce to a competitor with a real site
No time, budget, or technical skill to build a professional website themselves
DIY builders (Wix/Squarespace) or local freelancers are either low-quality, slow, or too expensive
No easy way for customers to book appointments or order products online

competitors.name: DIY website builders (Wix, Squarespace, GoDaddy)
competitors.differentiator: Framewrk delivers a finished, professionally branded site with zero effort from the owner — they see it built and live before paying, with no drag-and-drop work required from them.

competitors.name: Freelance web designers / local agencies
competitors.differentiator: Framewrk shows a live, working preview before any payment is collected, at a fraction of typical freelance turnaround time and price.

services.name: AI-Built Branded Website
services.description: A fully designed, mobile-responsive website generated by AI to match the business's niche and brand, built and deployed to a shareable preview link before the client pays anything.
inputs: Business name, category, and contact details
Any existing Instagram / Google Business Profile links or photos
outputs: Live Cloudflare preview link of the finished site
Full site source code on handover

services.name: Business Dashboard / Ordering & Booking Portal
services.description: An add-on personal dashboard/portal layered onto the website so customers can book appointments or order products directly, and the owner can manage them.
inputs: Product/service catalog or booking/class schedule details
outputs: Booking or ordering portal integrated into the delivered site
Basic owner admin view for managing orders/bookings
services.typical_duration: Minutes to hours depending on catalog size

value_proposition.headline: We build your business a stunning, on-brand website before you ever pay a cent — you only pay if you love it.
differentiators: The site is fully built and live on a shareable preview link before any payment changes hands, removing all client risk
AI-driven, brand-matched design aimed at agency/premium-brand polish, not a generic template
One-time fee with no lock-in — the client owns the code and can point their own domain at it immediately
Optional dashboard/portal add-on turns a simple site into a real booking or ordering channel
Founder-led personal outreach (not blind automated spam) keeps close rates high
proof_points: [TO BE CONFIRMED] — pre-launch, no case studies yet
value_proposition.positioning_statement: For local business owners who show up on Google Maps but have no website, Framewrk builds and shows them a finished, brand-matched website for free before they ever pay — unlike DIY builders or slow, expensive freelance designers.

tech_stack.primary_llm: OpenRouter free-tier model (no separate Anthropic/OpenAI API billing — neither a Claude.ai/Claude Code nor a ChatGPT subscription grants free programmatic API access)
tech_stack.fallback_llm: OpenRouter paid model, upgraded per-stage only if free-tier output quality is insufficient (website-builder-agent's site-generation call is the most likely candidate)
integrations: Google Business Profile / Maps page (manually submitted by founder, not auto-searched)
Cloudflare Queues (background job orchestration — replaces n8n)
AI image generation API (placeholder imagery when no usable client photos exist)
Domain registrar guidance (Cloudflare Registrar / Namecheap / GoDaddy)
tech_stack.hosting: Cloudflare (Workers + Queues + D1 + Pages) end to end — no n8n; the delivery pipeline is written as code triggered by queue jobs instead of visual workflow nodes
internal_tools: Framewrk internal platform: Cloudflare Pages dashboard (React/Vite/Tailwind, matching the existing repo dashboard) on top of a Cloudflare Workers API + Queues + D1 backend

steps: Founder finds a no-website business on Google Maps and pastes its Google Business Profile/Maps page link into the Framewrk dashboard
Platform parses that page for business info + available photos; founder adds anything missing
One-click 'Build Site' triggers the agent pipeline (brand design → asset sourcing → build → QA → deploy preview)
Founder calls or messages the business owner and shows the live preview link
Interested owner is sent a Stripe payment link
On payment, an automated handover package (code + domain setup instructions) is sent, with an optional referral to Phoenix Automation for ongoing automation/maintenance needs

delivery_workflow.methodology: One-click AI pipeline with a human-led close

phases.name: Sourcing
phases.description: Google Maps prospecting filtered to businesses with no existing website

phases.name: Build
phases.description: One-click AI generation of the branded website (and optional dashboard)

phases.name: QA & Preview
phases.description: Automated QA checklist, then deploy to a shareable Cloudflare preview link

phases.name: Outreach
phases.description: Founder calls/messages the prospect using a prepared script and the live preview link

phases.name: Close & Handover
phases.description: Stripe payment collected, then automated code + domain handover, with optional referral to Phoenix Automation

tiers.name: Website
tiers.description: One-time fee for a fully AI-designed, brand-matched, mobile-responsive website, previewed live before payment.
inclusions: Custom AI-designed website matched to the business's niche and brand
Full source code + domain setup instructions on handover
tiers.target_segment: Any local business with no existing website

tiers.name: Website + Dashboard
tiers.description: Everything in the Website tier plus a personal business dashboard/portal for accepting bookings or orders online.
inclusions: Booking or ordering portal integrated into the site
Full source code + domain setup instructions on handover
exclusions: Payment processing setup on the client's own storefront (client connects their own processor)
tiers.target_segment: Local businesses that take appointments, classes, or product orders

pricing.notes: One-time fee only, no retainer. Clients who want ongoing maintenance or further automation are referred to Phoenix Automation.

roles.title: Founder / Operator
responsibilities: Reviews sourced prospects and approves generated sites
Makes outreach calls/contacts using the prepared script and preview link

hiring_plan.title: Outreach/Sales Contractor
hiring_plan.trigger: When sourced+built site volume exceeds what the founder can personally call through each week

cost_structure: Claude/Anthropic API usage for site generation

agent_map.name: Prospect Sourcing Agent
agent_map.role: Parses a Google Business Profile/Maps page link submitted manually by the founder into a structured prospect record — no automated Maps search/scraping.
triggers: Founder submits a Google Business Profile/Maps link via the Framewrk dashboard
inputs: Any manual notes the founder adds
outputs: Prospect record: business name, category, contact info, address, social/GBP links

agent_map.name: Brand Design Agent
agent_map.role: Analyzes the business's niche and any existing brand signals to produce a design brief (palette, typography, tone, layout style) aimed at premium, agency-quality output.
outputs: Design brief (palette, typography, tone, layout direction)

agent_map.name: Asset Sourcing Agent
agent_map.role: Pulls usable images from the business's Instagram or Google Business Profile; falls back to AI-generated imagery matching the design brief when no usable client photos exist.
outputs: Image asset set for the site (sourced or AI-generated)

agent_map.name: Website Builder Agent
agent_map.role: Generates the full website codebase (and dashboard/portal when ordered) from the design brief and asset set — the core one-click site generator.

agent_map.name: Preview Deploy Agent
agent_map.role: Deploys the generated site to Cloudflare Pages as a shareable preview link for outreach.

agent_map.name: Site QA Agent
agent_map.role: Runs an automated quality checklist (responsiveness, broken links, brand consistency, load speed) before a site is used in outreach.
outputs: QA pass/fail verdict with issue list

agent_map.name: Outreach Prep Agent
agent_map.role: Turns a QA-passed preview into a ready-to-use contact package for the founder: call script/talking points, opening line specific to the business, and the preview link.

agent_map.name: Payment & Handover Agent
agent_map.role: Generates the Stripe payment link, and on confirmed payment, packages the final code and domain-setup instructions and sends the handover to the client.

planned_builds.name: Pipeline Reporting Agent
planned_builds.rationale: Weekly summary of sites built, contacted, and sold, and revenue — needed once volume makes manual tracking impractical.

operational.metric: Time from prospect sourced to preview link ready
QA pass rate on first generation

client_success.metric: Handovers completed with no unresolved client issues

assumptions.assumption: Local business owners will trust and pay for a website shown to them cold, with no prior relationship
assumptions.risk_if_wrong: Close rate stays too low to hit revenue targets even at high site-generation volume
assumptions.validation_method: Track preview-to-close conversion rate on the first 50 outreach attempts

assumptions.assumption: Instagram and Google Business Profile images can be reused in the preview and final site without explicit permission
assumptions.risk_if_wrong: Copyright/takedown risk and damaged trust with the prospect if imagery is misused
assumptions.validation_method: Get a review of Instagram Graph API terms and Google Business Profile photo usage rights before scaling past manual, per-site review

assumptions.assumption: AI-generated websites can reach genuinely premium, agency-quality design output without a human designer's touch-up
assumptions.risk_if_wrong: Sites look templated/generic, undermining the core 'agency-quality design' pitch
assumptions.validation_method: Manually review the first 10-20 generated sites against real agency portfolio benchmarks before removing any human review step

assumptions.assumption: A one-time fee with no retainer is enough to sustain and grow the business at target volume
assumptions.risk_if_wrong: Revenue plateaus with no recurring income; growth depends entirely on constant new sourcing and outreach volume
assumptions.validation_method: Track cumulative revenue vs. hours spent on sourcing and outreach after the first 90 days, and compare against referring clients into a Phoenix Automation retainer

gaps.gap: No AI image generation provider selected yet for placeholder imagery
gaps.resolution: Evaluate Cloudflare Workers AI or a Replicate-hosted model (e.g. Flux) for on-brand placeholder image generation

gaps.gap: Internal platform is not yet built — decision made (Cloudflare Workers + Queues + D1 + Pages, no n8n) but no code exists yet
gaps.resolution: Scaffold the Workers API + D1 schema + Queues job pipeline + Pages dashboard frontend

gaps.gap: Domain handover process (self-serve instructions vs. done-for-them) not yet finalized
gaps.resolution: Draft a one-page domain-connection guide (Cloudflare/Namecheap/GoDaddy) as the default; offer manual DNS setup as a paid rush option only if requested

gaps.gap: No legal/sale agreement drafted for the one-time website sale (ownership transfer, image usage rights, refund policy)
gaps.resolution: Draft a simple one-time sale agreement before the first real client transaction

build_priority.rationale: Nothing else runs without a pipeline of no-website Google Maps businesses to build sites for.
Defines the design brief that makes sites feel premium/on-brand instead of templated.
Needed so generated sites have real or AI-generated imagery instead of placeholders.
The core one-click AI site generator — this is the actual product.
Turns a generated site into a shareable Cloudflare preview link, which is the whole pitch to prospects.
Protects brand quality before a prospect ever sees a broken or generic-looking site.
Turns a finished preview into a ready-to-use call script and contact package for the founder.
Closes the loop: Stripe payment link plus automated code/domain handover package.
Cloudflare Workers (API) + Queues (background jobs) + D1 (database) + Pages (dashboard frontend) — replaces n8n entirely; without it every step above is a manual script.

build_priority.item: Legal review of image sourcing rights
build_priority.rationale: De-risk reuse of Instagram/Google Business Profile imagery before scaling outreach volume.
